meaning: n.目标,目的,(显微镜的)(接)物镜,[语法]宾格adj.客观的,[语法]宾格的
examples: What is the main objective of this project?
Winning is not the prime objective in this sport.
Our objective must be to secure a peace settlement.
The objective here is to hit the broad middle of taste as cost- and time-efficiently as possible.
Their innovations as managers--profit sharing, flex-time, management by objective, the "HP Way"--transformed modern industry.
